scripts.generate:api-client: npm run generate:http-openapi && openapi-generator-cli generate --generator-key api-client && tsx packages/api-client/scripts/postprocess-generated-sdk.ts
scripts.lint: npm run --workspaces lint && eslint --max-warnings=0 --ext .ts,.tsx playwright && prettier --ignore-path .prettierignore --check "**/*.{ts,tsx,js,json,md}"
scripts.lint:fix: npm run --workspaces --if-present lint -- --fix && eslint --max-warnings=0 --ext .ts,.tsx apps playwright --fix && npm run format
scripts.start:web: npm run build --workspace web && npm run start --workspace web -- --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3005
scripts.start:api: npm run db:generate && node scripts/prisma-migrate-deploy.mjs && cross-env PORT=4000 npm run start:dev --workspace api
scripts.start:api:e2e: npm run db:generate && node scripts/prisma-migrate-deploy.mjs && npm run build --workspace api && cross-env PORT=4000 npm run start:prod --workspace api
scripts.mobile:device: open -a "Android Emulator" || open -a Simulator || echo "Launch your emulator manually"
scripts.start:all: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres npm-run-all2 --sequential supabase:start db:reset && npm-run-all2 --parallel start:api start:web
scripts.prepare:playwright: npm run build --workspace @couture/utils && npm run build --workspace @couture/api-client
scripts.test:pw-local: npm run prepare:playwright && cross-env TEST_ENV=local npx playwright test
scripts.test:pw-local-ui: npm run prepare:playwright && cross-env TEST_ENV=local npx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:pw-preview: npm run prepare:playwright && node scripts/set-preview-e2e-base-url.mjs "npx playwright test"
scripts.test:pw-preview-ui: npm run prepare:playwright && node scripts/set-preview-e2e-base-url.mjs "npx playwright test --ui"
scripts.mobile:build: cd apps/mobile && EXPO_TOKEN="$EXPO_TOKEN" npx eas build --profile production --platform android
scripts.mobile:submit: cd apps/mobile && EXPO_TOKEN="$EXPO_TOKEN" npx eas submit --profile production --platform android --non-interactive
scripts.test:pw-prod: npm run prepare:playwright && cross-env TEST_ENV=prod npx playwright test
scripts.test:pw-prod-ui: npm run prepare:playwright && cross-env TEST_ENV=prod npx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:pw:burn-in: npm run prepare:playwright && PW_BURN_IN=true npx playwright test --repeat-each=3 --retries=0
scripts.test:mobile:e2e:ios: npm run maestro:install --silent && cross-env MOBILE_E2E_AUTO_BOOT_IOS=1 node ./scripts/run-maestro.mjs maestro/sanity.yaml
scripts.test:mobile:e2e:attached: npm run maestro:install --silent && cross-env MOBILE_E2E_SKIP_SERVER=1 node ./scripts/run-maestro.mjs maestro/sanity.yaml
scripts.observability:local:api: cross-env GRAFANA_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:4318 GRAFANA_OTLP_AUTH_HEADER=disabled OTEL_SERVICE_NAME=couturecast-api npm run start:api

*.{ts,tsx}: sh -c "npm run build --workspace @couture/utils && npm run build --workspace @couture/api-client"
